title: Oh Yeah! I Scored Big at a Discount Outcall Agency!!
description: Mr. Tajima has been living off his savings and unemployment ever since he lost his job. With little money he has left, he decides to enjoy himself by making an appointment with a discount outcall agency, which are known to not provide the best quality. However, when Akari shows up, it shows there are always exceptions to the rule.
author: Alps Ichimando
